mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ent_enterprise_setting WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ent_enterprise_setting ( enterprise_id, region, industry_field, industry_name, unit_nature, registered_date, registered_capital, legal_representative, legal_phone, is_central_enterprise, group_name, enterprise_address, unit_address, postal_code, admin_division_code, enterprise_email, fax, energy_mgmt_org, energy_leader_name, energy_leader_phone, energy_manager_name, energy_manager_mobile, energy_manager_cert, energy_dept_leader_phone, energy_cert, cert_pass_date, cert_authority, has_energy_center, enterprise_contact, enterprise_mobile, compiler_contact, compiler_name, compiler_mobile, compiler_email, industry_category, industry_code, superior_department, energy_enterprise_type, energy_usage_type, energy_leader_title, energy_dept_name, energy_audit_contact_name, energy_audit_contact_phone, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{region}, #{industryField}, #{industryName}, #{unitNature}, #{registeredDate}, #{registeredCapital}, #{legalRepresentative}, #{legalPhone}, #{isCentralEnterprise}, #{groupName}, #{enterpriseAddress}, #{unitAddress}, #{postalCode}, #{adminDivisionCode}, #{enterpriseEmail}, #{fax}, #{energyMgmtOrg}, #{energyLeaderName}, #{energyLeaderPhone}, #{energyManagerName}, #{energyManagerMobile}, #{energyManagerCert}, #{energyDeptLeaderPhone}, #{energyCert}, #{certPassDate}, #{certAuthority}, #{hasEnergyCenter}, #{enterpriseContact}, #{enterpriseMobile}, #{compilerContact}, #{compilerName}, #{compilerMobile}, #{compilerEmail}, #{industryCategory}, #{industryCode}, #{superiorDepartment}, #{energyEnterpriseType}, #{energyUsageType}, #{energyLeaderTitle}, #{energyDeptName}, #{energyAuditContactName}, #{energyAuditContactPhone}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE region = VALUES(region), industry_field = VALUES(industry_field), industry_name = VALUES(industry_name), unit_nature = VALUES(unit_nature), registered_date = VALUES(registered_date), registered_capital = VALUES(registered_capital), legal_representative = VALUES(legal_representative), legal_phone = VALUES(legal_phone), is_central_enterprise = VALUES(is_central_enterprise), group_name = VALUES(group_name), enterprise_address = VALUES(enterprise_address), unit_address = VALUES(unit_address), postal_code = VALUES(postal_code), admin_division_code = VALUES(admin_division_code), enterprise_email = VALUES(enterprise_email), fax = VALUES(fax), energy_mgmt_org = VALUES(energy_mgmt_org), energy_leader_name = VALUES(energy_leader_name), energy_leader_phone = VALUES(energy_leader_phone), energy_manager_name = VALUES(energy_manager_name), energy_manager_mobile = VALUES(energy_manager_mobile), energy_manager_cert = VALUES(energy_manager_cert), energy_dept_leader_phone = VALUES(energy_dept_leader_phone), energy_cert = VALUES(energy_cert), cert_pass_date = VALUES(cert_pass_date), cert_authority = VALUES(cert_authority), has_energy_center = VALUES(has_energy_center), enterprise_contact = VALUES(enterprise_contact), enterprise_mobile = VALUES(enterprise_mobile), compiler_contact = VALUES(compiler_contact), compiler_name = VALUES(compiler_name), compiler_mobile = VALUES(compiler_mobile), compiler_email = VALUES(compiler_email), industry_category = VALUES(industry_category), industry_code = VALUES(industry_code), superior_department = VALUES(superior_department), energy_enterprise_type = VALUES(energy_enterprise_type), energy_usage_type = VALUES(energy_usage_type), energy_leader_title = VALUES(energy_leader_title), energy_dept_name = VALUES(energy_dept_name), energy_audit_contact_name = VALUES(energy_audit_contact_name), energy_audit_contact_phone = VALUES(energy_audit_contact_phone), remark = VALUES(remark), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
